description: Petition from Mubārak b. Ibrahīm Ibn Sabra to Muʿtamid al-Dawla, who seems to be a Fatimid dignitary. The sender asks for (or heavily implies that he would like) a renewal of business relations. There is at least one other Mevorakh b. Avraham Ibn Sabra who appears in many other Geniza letters. See T-S Ar.39.11 for another mention of a Muʿtamid al-Dawla. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card and Khan.)
description_he: עתירה ממוברך ב. אברהים אבן סברה למועתמד אל-דולה, שנראה כנכבד פאטימי. השולח מבקש חידוש יחסי עסקים
